sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, char_value VARCHAR, code_value INTEGER, num_value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 'a', ord('a'), 100), (2, 'ü', ord('ü'), NULL), (3, '', ord(' '), 0), (4, NULL, NULL, 255);
SELECT id, code_value << 2 AS shifted_value FROM test_data WHERE char_value IS NOT NULL AND num_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ord(char_value) AS ascii_code FROM test_data WHERE ascii_code IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ascii_code LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, (ord(char_value) << 3) + num_value AS complex_calc FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE code_value IS NOT NULL) HAVING complex_calc > 300;

SELECT id, num_value, (ord(char_value) << 1) AS shifted_code FROM test_data t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, num_value FROM test_data WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE shifted_code < 200;
CREATE TABLE another_test (foreign_id INTEGER REFERENCES test_data(id), char_value VARCHAR);

SELECT t1.foreign_id, t1.char_value, (ord(t1.char_value) << 1) + (SELECT num_value FROM test_data WHERE id = t1.foreign_id) AS computed_value FROM another_test t1 WHERE t1.char_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY computed_value;
SELECT t1.id, ord(t1.char_value) AS ord_val, MAX(t1.num_value) OVER(PARTITION BY t1.char_value) AS max_num FROM test_data t1 WHERE t1.code_value IS NOT NULL AND (1 << ord(t1.char_value)) > 0;
